results.title: Saiful Malook: Fairytale lake captivates Eid tourists
results.description: SAIFUL MALOOK - Known for fairytales, Saiful Malook in upper Kaghan Valley drew influx of tourists and adventure sports enthusiasts during vacations of Eidul Azha amid laughter and excitement in its serene environment with waterfall emanating from Malika Perbath.
